Name: PC CF CARBON FILAMENT SPECTRUM 1.75mm 1KG
Description:
*Made in the EU. Filament Spectrum PC CF

*For advanced engineering and industrial projects

*PC CF is an advanced 3D printing filament based on the PC 275 formulation, offering additional reinforcement with 10 carbon fiber. This unique combination provides higher mechanical strength, increased rigidity, and excellent impact resistance, making PC CF an ideal choice for demanding engineering and industrial projects.

*The material retains all the key properties of PC 275, including excellent thermal resistance up to 150°C and good UV resistance, while the addition of carbon fiber further improves its stability and resistance to deformation. PC CF filament is optimized for low shrinkage, allowing for precise printing with minimal risk of warping.

*PC CF enables 3D printing of large models without the need for a heated chamber. The use of carbon fiber not only strengthens the printed structures but also gives them an elegant, matte finish, perfect for creating professional prototypes, functional parts, and industrial tools. Thanks to its resistance to moisture, chemicals, and abrasion, PC CF is an excellent material for producing parts exposed to harsh operating conditions.

*Tip: Due to the carbon fiber content, it is recommended to use nozzles with a diameter larger than the standard 0.4mm. Additionally, the presence of carbon fiber may cause degradation of standard brass nozzles, so for long-term use of Spectrum PA6 CF15, it is recommended to use hardened steel or ruby nozzles.

Description:
*PLEASE SPECIFY THE COLORS YOU WOULD LIKE TO ORDER FROM THE FOLLOWING LIST, AND INCLUDE THEM IN THE COMMENTS SECTION OF YOUR ORDER: 
*24035-ENERGY GREEN, 
*24034-FIRE RED, 
*24038-GRID BEIGE, 
*24029-MIDNIGHT BLACK, 
*24039-MOSS GREEN, 
*24037-PURE ORANGE, 
*24040-QUANTUM PURPLE, 
*24036-TUSCANY YELLOW, 
*24033-WINTER BLUE.

*Made in the EU. THE FILAMENT PLA HS by Spectrum

*THE FILAMENT PLA HS – a filament designed for fast and efficient 3D printing without compromising on quality. Thanks to its innovative formula, THE FILAMENT PLA HS enables printing at speeds of up to 600 mm/s, making it the ideal choice for users who want to accelerate the creation process without sacrificing precision.

*THE FILAMENT PLA HS offers not only speed but also reliability. With excellent layer adhesion, high dimensional stability, and ease of printing, this filament is perfect for both advanced projects and everyday prints. It allows for large orders to be completed in a short time while maintaining accuracy.

*Thanks to optimized technical parameters, THE FILAMENT PLA HS is perfectly suited for rapid prototyping, small-scale serial production and model creation where speed is key. By choosing THE FILAMENT PLA HS, you can count on the efficiency you need, while still enjoying the ease of printing characteristic of classic PLA. This product meets the demand of professionals while remaining accessible to enthusiasts looking for tools to speed up their workflow.

Name: PLA MATT SPECTRUM FILAMENT 1.75mm 1KG
Description:
*Made in the EU. Filament Spectrum PLA Premium

*Filament Spectrum PLA MATT

No more shiny surface

*Spectrum PLA MATT is a PLA-based material with a chemical composition modified so that it would be possible to obtain matte surfaces of printed object. The matte finish of printed items considerably improves their aesthetic properties and also minimises the visibility of layers on the side surfaces of printed items.

*In addition, Spectrum PLA MATT maintains all the features of PLA-based classic polymers, i.e. the easy and highly efficient printing, low shrinkage and very good adhesion between layers and also between the build platform and printed object. Further, the use of admixtures has improved temperature resistance, impact resistance and lowered the brittleness of printed items.

*Key features:

higher temperature resistance VICAT - 85°C in comparison to the standard PLA VICAT - 55°C
made of biodegradable raw material
high quality matte side surface with hardly visible layers
increased adhesion between the layers
high durability
high rigidity of items
no shrinkage after cooling
improved strength properties in terms of impact, elasticity and durability compared to elements made of classic PLA
UV stabilization
*Applications:

interior design
educational projects
architectural models
industrial design prototyping for concept visualisation
With the above-mentioned properties, the applications of Spectrum PLA MATT are mostly oriented towards the presentation of major aesthetic values, i.e. industrial design prototyping for concept visualisation and demonstration of designer variants of structures. It is also used for interior design purposes and architectural models.

Name: AQUAPRINT SPECTRUM SUPPORT FILAMENT 1.75mm 0.5KG
Description:
*Made in the EU. Filament Spectrum PLA Premium

*Filament Spectrum AquaPrint

*Excellent solubility in cold water

*AquaPrint is a water-soluble support material designed for complex multi-extrusion 3D printing. AquaPrint boasts a flow rate almost four times higher in comparison to PVA based support filaments and reduces dissolving time in water by half. However, the standout feature of AquaPrint is its exceptional adhesion to different materials like PLA, PETG, PA and TPU, offering twice the bonding strength compared to PVA.

*AquaPrint exhibits excellent solubility in cold water and exceptional thermal stability. It can be printed at lower temperatures, making it the ideal support material and ensuring excellent adherence.

*AquaPrint stands out with its greater structural rigidity compared to other support filaments, notably PVA. This characteristic significantly enhances material transfer from the extruder to the Hot End, particularly in Bowden extruder systems. This robust structural integrity also allows for the creation of solid supports, resulting in a superior final surface finish for your 3D-printed pieces.

*Users with dual extruder 3D printers can seamlessly combine AquaPrint with various materials, thanks to its straightforward printing configuration. Once your print is complete, AquaPrints biodegradability allows for responsible disposal through standard wastewater sinks according to local regulations.
The use of AquaPrint as a water-soluble support material enables the 3D printing of intricate structures, including those with moving parts, all in a single piece and with exceptional quality.

*Key features:

• Excellent cold water solubility
• Biodegradable, allowing for responsible disposal through standard wastewater sinks
• Great structural rigidity
• Flow rate nearly 4x higher than PVA-based support filaments
• Exceptional thermal stability, minimizing the likelihood of crystallization within the nozzle
• Perfect bonding to different materials PLA, PETG, PA, TPU

*Applications:

• Complex geometries that require support material

Name: PLA HS PREMIUM SPECTRUM FILAMENT 1.75mm 1KG
Description:
*Made in the EU. Filament Spectrum PLA Premium

*Premium PLA High Speed

*Print fast and precisely with the new Premium PLA High Speed

*Spectrum Premium PLA High Speed is our latest filament designed for fast 3D printing at speeds of up to 800mm/s, allowing for the creation of highly precise models in significantly shorter times. Our filament has been optimized for high-speed 3D printing technology, ensuring high flowability, rapid cooling and precise reproduction of details.
The enhanced mechanical properties of Premium PLA High Speed, surpassing standard PLA, are particularly important when printing at high speeds. The material stands out for its increased impact resistance and excellent layer adhesion. Premium PLA High Speed also boasts exceptional performance and quality, making it ideal for many applications, including rapid prototyping and conceptual modeling.
During the formulation of our product, we focused on maintaining an environmentally friendly profile, so it is composed of 100 bio-based materials and is industrially compostable.
In response to user demand, we have introduced a wide range of colors, including our eye-catching UV-reactive Neon series – Premium PLA High Speed allows for creativity without limits!

*Note: It should be remembered that higher printing speeds also require higher printing temperatures.

*Key features:

• High flow coefficient enabling fast printing up to 800mm/s
• Manufactued from fully biodegradable materials
• Good mechanical properties high hardness and tensile strength
• High aesthetics of the final print surface
• Suitable material for creating parts with high resolution
• High stiffness of printed objects
• No shrinkage after cooling
• Wide range of available colors
• Heat distortion temperature - 60°C

*Applications:

• Prototyping
• Conceptual models
• Visualization of finished products and semi-finished products
• Industrial design
• Educational projects
• Interior design

Name: PLA SILK SPECTRUM FILAMENT 1.75mm 1KG
Description:
*Made in the EU. Spectrum Magic SILK PLA

*Spectrum PLA SILK

*Unbelievable glossy effect

*SILK Filament is a PLA-based material for additive manufacturing with colour concentrates which imparts the satin texture effect to printed items. The surface satin texture of printed items largely reduces the visibility of layers on the side surface of printed items. Using a specially development pigment, it is possible to retain the classic properties of PLA, i.e. the simple and efficient printing, while obtaining a very low shrinkage rate and relatively high tensile strength. Thus the material is designed for those who appreciate simple printing and very high aesthetic properties.

*Key features:

unique aesthetic properties
reduced visibility of layers on the side surfaces of printed items
satin shine on the entire surface of printed items
maintenance of all the mechanical strength parameters of the standard PLA
user friendly
no shrinkage after cooling
*Applications:

decorative art
interior design
educational projects
concept and demo prototyping of designed finished and semi-finished products

Name: PLA The Filament 1.75mm 1KG
Description:
*Made in the EU. THE FILAMENT PLA by Spectrum

*Discover THE FILAMENT PLA by Spectrum – a filament designed for 3D printing enthusiasts who value quality and simplicity. It’s the perfect choice for those who want to bring their ideas to life without compromises, while also being mindful of the environment and budget. THE FILAMENT PLA combines reliability and functionality, making it ideal for everyday 3D printing challenges.

*THE FILAMENT PLA by Spectrum is manufactured in Europe, which helps shorten the supply chain and reduce emissions associated with long-distance transportation. The filament is wound on a spool made from recycled plastic, certified as 2nd life. By choosing THE FILAMENT PLA, you opt for practicality and responsibility, supporting sustainable development.

*THE FILAMENT PLA offers high quality in a simpler, more eco-friendly version. This more affordable alternative does not compromise on quality but focuses on practicality and functionality. By choosing THE FILAMENT PLA by Spectrum, you select a product that meets your expectations while caring for your budget and the environment around you.

Name: PETG The Filament 1.75mm 1KG

*THE FILAMENT PETG by Spectrum – filament designed for those seeking a material that combines strength with ease of printing. THE FILAMENT PETG is the ideal choice for projects that require durability, flexibility and resistance. PETG is a practical choice for users who value both reliability and the convenience of working with a material that maintains excellent mechanical properties.

*By choosing THE FILAMENT PETG by Spectrum, you are opting for strength and versatility – a solution that meets the demands of the most challenging projects.

Name: PC CF CARBON FILAMENT SPECTRUM 1.75mm 1KG
Description:
*Made in the EU. Filament Spectrum PC CF

*For advanced engineering and industrial projects

*PC CF is an advanced 3D printing filament based on the PC 275 formulation, offering additional reinforcement with 10 carbon fiber. This unique combination provides higher mechanical strength, increased rigidity, and excellent impact resistance, making PC CF an ideal choice for demanding engineering and industrial projects.

*The material retains all the key properties of PC 275, including excellent thermal resistance up to 150°C and good UV resistance, while the addition of carbon fiber further improves its stability and resistance to deformation. PC CF filament is optimized for low shrinkage, allowing for precise printing with minimal risk of warping.

*PC CF enables 3D printing of large models without the need for a heated chamber. The use of carbon fiber not only strengthens the printed structures but also gives them an elegant, matte finish, perfect for creating professional prototypes, functional parts, and industrial tools. Thanks to its resistance to moisture, chemicals, and abrasion, PC CF is an excellent material for producing parts exposed to harsh operating conditions.

*Tip: Due to the carbon fiber content, it is recommended to use nozzles with a diameter larger than the standard 0.4mm. Additionally, the presence of carbon fiber may cause degradation of standard brass nozzles, so for long-term use of Spectrum PA6 CF15, it is recommended to use hardened steel or ruby nozzles.

Name: PLA GLOW in the DARK SPECTRUM FILAMENT 1.75mm 0.5KG
Description:
*Made in the EU. SPECTRUM Glow in the Dark

*Unbelievable strong after-glow effect

*Spectrum PLA Glow in the Dark is a PLA-based filament blended with a concentrated phosphorescent pigment which causes the phosphorescence effect. Accordingly, once the printed items are exposed to an external light source, they will emit their own light. The material has all the typical characteristics of the pure PLA ? the added pigment has a neutral impact on the material’s properties.

*The addition of a phosphorescent supplement to PLA provides for the following properties in printed items:

*The capability to emit own light after prior exposure to an external source of light, and
The possibility to ?control? the light intensity of printed items by adjusting the wall thickness and filler density.

*Tip: To achieve a stronger and longer lasting glowing effect, leave the model exposed to light for a longer time. The presence of phosphorescent pigment may also cause the wear of brass nozzle thus it is recommended to use stainless steel nozzles for prolonged

Name: ASA 275 SPECTRUM FILAMENT 1.75mm 1KG
Description:
*Made in the EU. Filament Spectrum ASA 275

*UV and thermal resistance

*Filament Spectrum ASA 275 is a professional material, designed for desktop 3D printers.
The composition of Spectrum ASA 275 has been specially modified to make the material more flexible, improve flow parameters, reduce shrinkage, and increase adhesion between layers.

*One of the main advantage of the modification of ASA 275 material is simplification of printing parameters. Spectrum ASA 275 technical material can be printed nearly with the same ease as Premium PLA. This allows the production of large models without the risk of deformation after cooling, but also obtaining relatively high printing speeds.

*ASA 275 is a material resistant to UV radiation and other weather conditions. ASA 275 can be used for printing prototypes, functional production tools, but also elements that must withstand changing weather conditions, and even everyday use items.


*Key features:
excellent resistance to external exposure and changing weather conditions
good thermal resistance HDT - 85°C
Vicat softening temperature - 94°C
resistance to UV radiation,
perfect interlayer adhesion,
ability to print on desktop printers without a heated chamber
high speed printing up to 200mm/s
glossy print surface,
ease of printing comparable to classic PLA

*Applications:
functional prototypes
tooling
production tools
end-use parts
custom components

Name: PLA MAGIC SILK SPECTRUM FILAMENT 1.75mm 1KG
Description:
*Made in the EU. Spectrum Magic SILK PLA

*Color fusion – transform your 3D-prints with Magic SILK PLA
Spectrum Magic SILK PLA is an innovative 3D printing filament that transforms your projects into true works of art with its incredible color-shifting effect. Utilizing advanced co-extrusion technology, Magic SILK PLA combines two colors in one strand, creating breathtaking color transitions and dynamic light effects. Each print made with this filament shimmers with colors depending on the viewing angle and lighting, giving your models depth and a unique character.

*Magic SILK PLA offers a smooth, glossy surface that not only catches the eye but also adds elegance to every project. Its exceptional properties make it easy to use and compatible with most 3D printers using FDM/FFF technology, making it an ideal choice for both beginners and advanced users. The filament is characterized by excellent print precision.

*Prints made with Magic SILK PLA look best in models with intricate details, where the color-shifting effect is most impressive. Thanks to Magic SILK PLA, your projects will gain a new, extraordinary dimension, bringing an element of magic and innovation to every creation. This dual-color filament is an indispensable choice for designers, artists, and 3D printing enthusiasts who want to enhance their work with a unique, magical effect.

Name: PLA GLOW in the DARK SPECTRUM FILAMENT 1.75mm 1KG
Description:
*Made in the EU. SPECTRUM Glow in the Dark

*Unbelievable strong after-glow effect

*Spectrum PLA Glow in the Dark is a PLA-based filament blended with a concentrated phosphorescent pigment which causes the phosphorescence effect. Accordingly, once the printed items are exposed to an external light source, they will emit their own light. The material has all the typical characteristics of the pure PLA the added pigment has a neutral impact on the material’s properties.

*The addition of a phosphorescent supplement to PLA provides for the following properties in printed items:

*The capability to emit own light after prior exposure to an external source of light, and
The possibility to ?control? the light intensity of printed items by adjusting the wall thickness and filler density.

*Tip: To achieve a stronger and longer lasting glowing effect, leave the model exposed to light for a longer time. The presence of phosphorescent pigment may also cause the wear of brass nozzle thus it is recommended to use stainless steel nozzles for prolonged

Name: PLA PROGRAFEN GRAPHENE LIGHT SPECTRUM FILAMENT 1.75MM 1KG
Description:
*Made in the EU. Filament Spectrum Prografen

* Enriching PLA with graphene makes this filament well-suited for a wide range of demanding applications.

*Prografen PLA is a high-quality polymer filament for 3D printers, made on biodegradable PLA basis. It contains approximately 0.5 edge-functionalized graphene flakes EFG, which enhances the mechanical properties of the filament compared to standard PLA, while maintaining all the advantages of this popular material.

*The small amount of graphene increases strength, flexibility and wear resistance, making this filament more durable than traditional PLA. The material also exhibits good thermal conductivity, which can speed up the printing process while ensuring dimensional accuracy.

*The filament can be easily printed using standard brass nozzles without the risk of excessive wear, unlike materials reinforced with carbon fibers. Prografen PLA Graphene Light is an ideal choice for designers, hobbyists and engineers who need a material with improved performance that is easy to print, without requiring advanced printer settings.

Name: PLA MAGIC SILK SPECTRUM FILAMENT 1.75mm 1KG
Description:
*Made in the EU. Spectrum Magic SILK PLA

*Color fusion – transform your 3D-prints with Magic SILK PLA
Spectrum Magic SILK PLA is an innovative 3D printing filament that transforms your projects into true works of art with its incredible color-shifting effect. Utilizing advanced co-extrusion technology, Magic SILK PLA combines two colors in one strand, creating breathtaking color transitions and dynamic light effects. Each print made with this filament shimmers with colors depending on the viewing angle and lighting, giving your models depth and a unique character.

*Magic SILK PLA offers a smooth, glossy surface that not only catches the eye but also adds elegance to every project. Its exceptional properties make it easy to use and compatible with most 3D printers using FDM/FFF technology, making it an ideal choice for both beginners and advanced users. The filament is characterized by excellent print precision.

*Prints made with Magic SILK PLA look best in models with intricate details, where the color-shifting effect is most impressive. Thanks to Magic SILK PLA, your projects will gain a new, extraordinary dimension, bringing an element of magic and innovation to every creation. This dual-color filament is an indispensable choice for designers, artists, and 3D printing enthusiasts who want to enhance their work with a unique, magical effect.

Name: S-FLEX 85A SPECTRUM FILAMENT 1.75mm 0.5KG
Description:
*Made in the EU. Filament S-Flex 85A by Spectrum

* Flexibility with very good impact strength and thermal insulation

* Spectrum S-Flex 85A is a filament based on a thermoplastic polyether polyurethane. In the area of additive manufacturing, S-Flex 85A is a material characterized by a relatively easy and failure-free 3D printing process. An additional advantage that allows obtaining a perfect printout is very good adhesion of the first layer of the printed part to the working space, regardless of whether it is made of glass, steel, plastic or other material.

Low processing shrinkage and high flexibility significantly reduce the risk of the so-called curling up of the edges of manufactured parts. The distinguishing feature in the filament name 85A – relates to the hardness of the material on the Shore scale and classifies Spectrum S-Flex 85A in the category of hard elastomers. This property from the point of view of the 3D printing process reduces the risk of filament deformation in the insertion system leading the material to the printing head. This enables a slightly faster printing compared to other, more compliant elastomers.

Parts made of Spectrum S-Flex 85A are characterized by very high resistance to hydrolysis a kind of degradation caused by the presence of water, good recyclability and very good resistance to dynamic forces. Thanks to these properties, it is possible to 3D print parts that protect surfaces exposed to impact bumpers, sharp edge guards, sealing and protective elements with high chemical resistance, as well as thermal insulators.

*Premium PLA High Speed

*Print fast and precisely with the new Premium PLA High Speed

*Spectrum Premium PLA High Speed is our latest filament designed for fast 3D printing at speeds of up to 800mm/s, allowing for the creation of highly precise models in significantly shorter times. Our filament has been optimized for high-speed 3D printing technology, ensuring high flowability, rapid cooling and precise reproduction of details.

Premium PLA High Speed also boasts exceptional performance and quality, making it ideal for many applications, including rapid prototyping and conceptual modeling.
During the formulation of our product, we focused on maintaining an environmentally friendly profile, so it is composed of 100 bio-based materials and is industrially compostable.
In response to user demand, we have introduced a wide range of colors, including our eye-catching UV-reactive Neon series – Premium PLA High Speed allows for creativity without limits!
